title: Treasury yields are little changed as investors remain optimistic on Iran peace deal prospects despite U.S. strikes
summary_full: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — fell more than 2 basis points to 4.465%.
summary_public: The yield on the 10-year U.S. Treasury note — the key benchmark for U.S. government borrowing — fell more than 2 basis points to 4.465%.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: investors remain optimistic on Iran peace deal prospects despite U.S. strikes
